# TinyHomeInsurance.co.nz

> Specialist insurance for tiny homes, tiny houses on wheels (THOWs), container homes, and off-grid dwellings across New Zealand.

TinyHomeInsurance.co.nz is a New Zealand insurance referral service. We connect tiny home owners with NZ-licensed insurance advisers who specialise in non-standard dwellings. Our advisers have access to the broking market and can arrange specialist cover for all types of tiny homes.

## About This Service

TinyHomeInsurance.co.nz is a lead generation and referral service, not an insurer or licensed financial adviser. Advisers referred through this service are NZ-licensed under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013. The service is free to consumers; advisers earn commission from insurers.

Contact: hello@cover4you.co.nz

## Core Pages

- / — Homepage with overview of cover types, comparison table, three-step process
- /coverage/ — All coverage types for tiny homes in NZ
- /faq/ — Frequently asked questions about tiny home insurance in NZ
- /compare/ — Comparison of NZ insurers: AA, Initio, State, Tower, specialist providers
- /contact/ — Quote request form — connect with a NZ specialist adviser
- /about/ — About the service and financial advice disclosure

## Coverage Type Pages

- /coverage/building-structure/ — Building and structure insurance for tiny homes (THOW, container, off-grid)
- /coverage/contents-insurance/ — Contents insurance for tiny home residents
- /coverage/transit-towing-cover/ — Transit cover for tiny homes on wheels (THOW)
- /coverage/public-liability/ — Public liability insurance for tiny home owners
- /coverage/off-grid-systems/ — Cover for solar panels, battery banks, rainwater systems
- /coverage/loss-of-use/ — Alternative accommodation cover when home is uninhabitable
- /coverage/landlord-insurance/ — Landlord insurance for rental tiny homes

## SEO Landing Pages

- /tiny-home-on-wheels/ — Complete guide to tiny house on wheels (THOW) insurance in NZ
- /container-home-insurance/ — Specialist insurance for shipping container homes in NZ
- /off-grid-home-insurance/ — Off-grid home insurance including solar, battery, and water systems
- /tiny-home-insurance-cost/ — How much does tiny home insurance cost in NZ? Indicative premium ranges for 2026

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Jurisdiction: New Zealand only
- Language: English (NZ)
- Currency: NZD
- Regulatory context: Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013 (FMCA); Natural Hazards Insurance Act 2023 (replaced EQC Act from April 2023)
- Insurance types covered: Building, contents, transit/towing, public liability, off-grid systems, loss of use, landlord
- Home types covered: THOW (tiny house on wheels), fixed tiny home, container conversion, off-grid dwelling, park home
- Key NZ insurers mentioned: AA, Initio Insurance, State, Tower, specialist intermediaries
- Not an insurer or licensed financial adviser — referral service only
